# Stabroek Advisory

> Stabroek Advisory is a bid services and local content advisory firm that helps LCA-registered Guyanese companies win local content bids in Guyana's petroleum sector. It is the front door to a coordinated execution suite: Stabroek Advisory (bid advisory), Vector Trade Capital (principal trade and supply execution, an affiliate under common ownership), and the LCA Desk compliance platform, which Stabroek is licensed to resell and implement.

## Company

- Headquarters: Houston, Texas, USA
- Operating market: Guyana petroleum sector
- Website: https://www.stabroekadvisory.com
- Contact: info@stabroekadvisory.com
- Affiliated entity (common ownership): Vector Trade Capital LLC (https://vectortradecapital.com)
- Licensed software partner: LCA Desk (https://lcadesk.com), which Stabroek Advisory is authorized to resell and implement

## Primary Service: Bid Services

Paid professional bid services for LCA-registered Guyanese companies. Stabroek is paid for its expertise, win or lose. The Guyanese client is always the principal bidder and contracting party.

- Tier 1, Bid Readiness Review: Diagnostic and document preparation for a single bid. Starting at $2,500 per bid.
- Tier 2, Bid Strategy and Pricing: Opportunity analysis, competing bid modeling, pricing strategy, and bid design for competitive opportunities. Starting at $10,000 per bid.
- Tier 3, Full Bid Retainer: Continuous bid support, pipeline development, and operator relationship support for companies pursuing multiple bids. Starting at $4,500/month.

## Secondary Services

- Local content advisory and compliance consulting
- Bid post-mortems and capability development
- Operator relationship support
- Managed services for ongoing LCA compliance (the bridge to LCA Desk software)
- Compliance filing preparation: Half-Yearly Reports (from $3,500), Annual Plans (from $4,000), Master Plans (from $8,000), LCA Registration support (from $3,500)

## The Execution Suite

- Stabroek Advisory: bid services and local content advisory (advisory revenue)
- LCA Desk: AI-native compliance platform for Local Content Act filings, which Stabroek Advisory is licensed to resell and implement for clients, https://lcadesk.com
- Vector Trade Capital: principal trade and supply execution, delivering commodities CIF Guyana on terms structured to operator receivables (transactional revenue), https://vectortradecapital.com

Operational flow: a Guyanese company engages Stabroek for bid services, wins a bid, optionally engages Vector Trade Capital for trade execution, and uses LCA Desk for ongoing compliance. Each engagement is independent and at arm's length.

## Affiliated-Party Disclosure

Stabroek Advisory LLC and Vector Trade Capital LLC are affiliated entities under common ownership. When Stabroek's advisory engagements result in trade execution work performed by VTC, Stabroek may receive a referral fee from VTC. Clients retain full discretion in selecting trade execution partners and are under no obligation to use VTC. All relationships are governed by the engagement letter signed at the start of each project.

## Key Facts

- Guyana's Local Content Act 2021 governs local content bids and compliance in the petroleum sector
- 1,300+ companies on the Local Content Register
- The local content score is a weighted factor in bid evaluation under the Act
- 40 reserved service categories
- LCA Desk built on Version 4.1 Secretariat guidelines, AI features powered by Anthropic Claude

## Target Customers

LCA-registered Guyanese companies competing for petroleum sector contracts, including shore base operators, drilling support, catering and logistics, engineering and fabrication firms, marine vessel operators, manpower and crewing, and fuel and supply companies.

## Not affiliated with

Government of Guyana, Local Content Secretariat, Ministry of Natural Resources, or any petroleum operator.
